response.text:

rationale: r1c2 is on distrusted_peers list, cluster-wide stress detected, your SoC below 0.70 threshold, and conservative policy mandates aggregator coordination only—peer sharing suspended until grid reconnection and SoC recovery confirmed.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.7, distrusted_peers=['r1c2', 'r3c2', 'r2c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded with declining SoC despite recent recovery; cluster-wide stress detected. All geographic peers have rejected r2c2 requests and are themselves requesting. Aggregator coordination is only viable path. Reject all peer shares until SoC > 0.70 and grid reconnection confirmed..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
